priorities.productPrinciple: Only 1–2 areas get hard threshold nudges. Everything else is OK at a lighter rhythm—not failure.

balanceSignal.note: Gentle observe when personal/care time is high while career priorities are thin on the calendar

templates: 💼 PM Life: {job_hours}h this week — you went over your season target. That focus is showing up. Well done.
Orange blocks added up: about {job_hours}h for PM Life. You aimed high and the calendar backed you — congratulations.
Night sleep looks thin — about {night_rest_hours}h from long off-calendar gaps between 00:00 and 08:00, under your {sleep_threshold_hours}h margin. Worth protecting sleep before adding more blocks.
Estimated night rest: {night_rest_hours}h this week (big off-calendar gaps at night). Below your {sleep_threshold_hours}h line — notice, don't panic.
{meeting_hours} hours in meetings this week. That's a full workweek inside the week—notice how it landed, not how to fix it tonight.
{meeting_hours}h of meetings. The calendar was loud. You don't have to be.
Only {free_mornings_before_11} weekday morning(s) before 11 with nothing scheduled. Mornings are where you wanted space.
Your mornings before 11 are mostly spoken for. That's a pattern—not a verdict.

Personal life & care (social, rest, meals, body…) logged about {personal_care_hours}h this week; career-focused blocks (job search, DJing, radio) about {career_hours}h. You're prioritizing {priority_labels} this season—worth noticing if the calendar matches that, without guilt.
A lot of lavender-shaped time, lighter on the career colors you said matter most. Observation, not a verdict.
Radio Life had about {rbl_hours}h on the calendar—crumbs, not the two 2–3h blocks you're aiming for.
Radio showed up as fragments. You wanted real blocks this week, not leftovers.
Job search & brand: roughly {job_hours}h scheduled. Your trimester aim is closer to 3–4h daily—this week was thin.
Not much orange on the calendar. Intentions and blocks diverge sometimes.
Admin and life upkeep hit about {admin_hours}h—above the ~4h/week you want as a ceiling. Gaps get eaten fast.
More admin than you meant to allow. Keeping it under 4h is a quiet kind of discipline.
Health / exercise: about {health_hours}h blocked. You're aiming for at least 5h—yoga, gym, home sessions.
Movement didn't get much calendar space this week. Bodies don't live in Google Calendar—but you said 5h matters.
Social life: about {social_hours}h on the calendar this week. You're often around {social_target}h—people and plans matter to you.
Less lavender than usual—fewer names, fewer events. Worth noticing, not fixing tonight.
{open_evenings_after_20} weeknights after 8pm had nothing on the calendar. Space—even if it didn't all feel like rest.
DJing & music prep: about {djing_hours}h this week—under your ~10h target. It's paying work and creative life, not a side hustle guilt trip.
Less blueberry time for mixes and prep. You said this path is worth investing in—not only enjoying it.
Most weeknights after 8pm were booked. Evenings are a different kind of morning.
{free_mornings_before_11} weekday mornings before 11 stayed open. Room—even if it didn't all feel like rest.
Three+ quiet mornings before 11. Suspiciously civilized.
One day had more than 2h of siesta / podcast / radio on the books. Mid-day rest is allowed—it just piled up that day.
Day rest passed 2h on at least one day. Notice if it felt restorative or like avoidance.
Meals & nourishment: about {meals_hours}h this week—above your ~14h band (≈2h/day eating + ~4h prep). Counting isn't judging—just seeing the pattern.
Only about {meals_hours}h blocked for meals this week. You aim for ~14h—time to eat and shop matters to you.
Home cleaning: about {cleaning_hours}h over the last {window_weeks} weeks. You're aiming for ~10h/month (3h blocks every two weeks).
Less house-cleaning time than you meant. A 3h block every two weeks is the rhythm you wanted.
Laundry & wardrobe: about {laundry_hours}h this week. You'd like ~2h weekly for ropa/colada and ordering your space.
DJing & music prep: about {djing_hours}h this week—you're showing up for the craft and the income path (€400/mo is in sight).
Solid time on music work. Worthy of investment, not just fun between job-search blocks.
A lighter week on the calendar. Nothing loud to report—maybe that's the insight.
Not much for the algorithm to perform about. Co-Star would be jealous.
Self-care (showers, skin/hair): about {self_care_hours}h this week. You're aiming for ~10h—body care as scheduled care, not vanity.
Less time blocked for self-care than you wanted. Worth noticing without turning it into another thing to optimize.

sampleGoals.label: This season: pick 1–2 priorities only (hard nudges). Rest = OK lighter.
PRIORITY: PM Life 💼
PRIORITY: DJing & music 🎧
Protect weekday mornings before 11
Two radio blocks per week (2–3 hours each)
Job search & brand: 3–4 hours daily (trimester / weekly intention)
Keep admin under 4 hours per week
At least 5 hours of exercise per week (yoga, gym, home)
Quality time with Lua — walks & special outings (beach, park…)
sampleGoals.note: Yellow blocks anywhere; easy to overlook—worth seeing in the chart

sampleGoals.label: Time to eat well: meals, cooking, supermarket (sustainable nourishment)
sampleGoals.note: Basil / green blocks — hidden goal, track in chart

sampleGoals.label: Keep Mon–Fri after 8pm mostly open
Body & health on the calendar
Stop letting admin eat the gaps
Day rest (siesta, podcast, radio): max ~2h per day
Meals ~14h/week (≈2h/day eating + ~4h supermarket/prep)
Home cleaning: ~10h/month (3h blocks every two weeks)
Laundry & wardrobe (ropa/colada): ~2h/week
Social life (lavender): ~10 hours per week
DJing & music prep: ~10 hours per week
Build DJ income toward €400/month (paid creative work)
Meals or Lua walks with friends — same moment, two colors OK
sampleGoals.note: Banana/basil + person's name = integration, not hustle

sampleGoals.label: CAPRIXXO — counts as both radio and DJing
Lavender errands tied to radio (pickups, handoffs)
sampleGoals.note: May look social; also volunteer logistics

sampleGoals.label: Self-care (lavender): ~10 hours per week — showers, skin/hair

targetsAudit.note: See docs/targets-audit.md — some goals are aspirations; job-search daily is trimester-scale
tensions: job_search_daily_3-4h is ~21-28h/week if taken literally — trimester aspiration, not weekly budget
social + djing + self_care = 30h/week before work, meals, radio, job search
relatedBlocks may double-count hours in chart (intentional)
